title: No Ordinary Love
meaning_summary: This recording stays valuable because it combines emotional clarity with a mood that still fits modern playlist listening.
revenue_drivers: Mood and soul playlists provide steady repeat listening.
Strong emotional recognition keeps the song relevant over time.
Prestige sync and cultural retrospectives extend the song's commercial life.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: No Ordinary Love is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
